title: CohortDecisionOutput
description: Strict JSON contract returned by a cohort agent at each tick (PRD §10.5). Each *_action item references a tool_id from social_action_tools.json plus an args object. Downstream validators check args against the tool's JSONSchema and reject unknown tool_ids, unknown emotion keys, or unknown event_type keys.

public_actions.description: Public-facing actions that are not pure social-content (e.g. support_event, oppose_event, follow/unfollow). Items must use tool_ids from the 'social' or 'event' or 'group' categories that are public-effect.

event_actions.description: Calls to event-category tools (queue_event, modify_own_queued_event, cancel_own_queued_event, support_event, oppose_event).

social_actions.description: Calls to social-category tools (create_social_post, comment_on_post, repost, upvote_or_promote, downvote_or_criticize, follow_actor, unfollow_actor, stay_silent).

emotions.description: Map of emotion key (from emotions.json) -> value in [0, 10].

issue_stance.description: Map of issue_stance axis key -> value in [-1, 1].

perceived_majority.description: Map of issue_stance axis key -> perceived agreeing fraction in [0, 1].

split_merge_proposals.description: Calls to group-category split/merge tools. Engine will validate population conservation and split distance independently.

main_factors.description: Concise structured list of the dominant factors in this tick's decision. Not raw chain-of-thought.

args.description: Arguments validated against the tool's json_schema downstream.
